rationale: The citing paper is centered on lead–lag estimation of pre/postpromotion dips and their cross-sectional determinants, while the cited paper focuses on translating elasticity decomposition into net unit-sales brand-switching effects; this indicates related promotion context but different primary objectives/methods. The provided evidence contains only a DOI-level match (no in-text citation context), and the citing note does not explicitly state direct methodological or theoretical use of this cited work, so it cannot be safely dropped as clearly incidental.
